entity.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018; BitKeep joined the wider Bitget ecosystem in March 2023 and later rebranded as Bitget Wallet.
entity.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2018 founding year and continuing operation. In March 2023, Bitget announced that BitKeep had joined the wider Bitget ecosystem; BitKeep later rebranded as Bitget Wallet.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Bitget brand.

changes.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018; BitKeep joined the wider Bitget ecosystem in March 2023 and later rebranded as Bitget Wallet.
changes.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2018 founding year and continuing operation. In March 2023, Bitget announced that BitKeep had joined the wider Bitget ecosystem; BitKeep later rebranded as Bitget Wallet.

events.title: Bitget began operating
events.description: Bitget began operating as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange in 2018.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker based on official company history.

events.title: BitKeep joined the Bitget ecosystem
events.description: Bitget announced a strategic transaction that brought BitKeep into the wider Bitget ecosystem.
events.notes: BitKeep later rebranded as Bitget Wallet. The event did not change the active status of the Bitget exchange.

evidence.title: About Bitget
evidence.notes: Official company page identifying 2018 as Bitget's founding year.

evidence.title: Bitget official exchange
evidence.notes: Current official exchange interface corroborating continuing operation.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitget
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the Bitget identity, Seychelles registration, and 2018 establishment year.

evidence.title: Bitget and BitKeep strategic transaction
evidence.notes: Official announcement records the Bitget and BitKeep transaction.

evidence.title: BitKeep roadmap announces Bitget Wallet name
evidence.notes: Official follow-up records the BitKeep rebrand as Bitget Wallet.
